title: EOS template

posts.author: SteveHUK (Steve Herbert)
posts.cookedHtml:
@DafneLaunchPoint
I’d be very grateful if you can send me the template. My employer is finding dedicated EOS platforms to be a bit too restrictive for our needs. The flexibility of Monday might be the solution for us.

Steveherbert12@gmail.com

Many thanks
SteveH

posts.author: DafneLaunchPoint (Dafne)
posts.cookedHtml: Just sent you an email Steve - hope it is helpful!

posts.author: SteveHUK (Steve Herbert)
posts.cookedHtml: Many thanks, Dafne.
